skill.name: Dungeon Delver
skill.description: You've spent your whole life training for this moment: now the dungeon is here before you. Will you choke?

description.text: This is it! Your big moment! Don't screw it up! Come home with the shinies or on them!

When push comes to shove, you're the one doing the shoving. With this skill, you have a limited ability to move objects around the dungeon. Sometimes you push a little too hard and end up breaking whatever you were pushing, so be careful.
You have a knack for always having the right tool for the job. Maybe not the job you're currently working on, but a job nonetheless.
You've always picked things up quickly, but down here in the dungeon you find your senses tuned. You gain extra experience from killing monsters and have learned a few things about smithing.
...which is a fancy way of saying 'teleport wherever you like, as long as it's in a straight line'. So it's not actually very unfettered. Who named this ability?
You've learned from watching batties how to emit a low-frequency hum that harmonizes with the environment around you. If you're looking for a fragile wall, this is the way to find it.
You've gleaned how to do a little bit of tinkering. While it's not stellar, at least you can do something. Also, sometimes you find yourself just...tripping over ingredients.
Sometimes, there's just a wall in your way.

You know Krong is a fickle god, and you've studied the ways that some creatures can render useful objects into non-useful husks of their former glory. Through in-depth study, meditation, and a training montage involving 80's hair metal, a volcano, and Mr. Miyagi, you've learned how to reverse those effects...sort of.

skill.name: Meteorology
skill.description: Today's forecast: partly cloudy with a chance of PAIN.

description.text: Today's forecast: partly cloudy with a chance of PAIN.
It's your job to be right about 40% of the time. Be vague to increase your accuracy!
Dear lord, this is amazing! Look how this cold front and warm front interact to create this cumulus cloud layer!

ability.name: Cloudy With A Chance Of Meatballs

description.text: Today's Forecast: fresh steak with a chance of steak sauce showers.
Hey, look at that! You rolled the dice and things came up in your favor...this time!

You've got this one down. There's definitely something that's falling from the sky. Right now. Hard to tell what it is, but if you announce it just before it hits, you'll at least look like you know your job.
Would you look at that! Shooting stars sure are pretty.

skill.name: Avenging Executioner
skill.description: You have a score to settle, and you've heard there's lich on the menu.

description.text: You have a score to settle, and you've heard there's lich on the menu.
You are fearsome and ruthless with a blade. The diggles whisper something about the 'demon barber' when you come near.
When you hit hard, you hit really hard.
Your presence is so fearsome that your enemies cower and flee before you.
You enjoy reveling in the slaughter of your enemies. You find it...revitalizing.
Enemies who witness your brutal slaughter in battle are struck with fear and awe. And some damage.
To crush your enemies, see them driven before you, and to hear the lamentation of their diggles!

skill.name: Haunted
skill.description: You are haunted by spectres of those slain in the dungeons. Sometimes they help you.

description.text: You are haunted by spectres of those slain in the dungeons. Sometimes they help you.
You see dead people. Well, diggles. And other monsters, too.
You can call on one of your spirits to terrorize a still (un)living creature. They seem to like the terror it generates.
The spirits that accompany you are getting more willing to help you stay alive. When you ask, a pair of them will devote themselves to your defense.
By directing your entire horde of spirits at a single victim, you lose them all -- but the victim loses much, much more.

You can ask one of your spirits to stay behind and enter the body of any creature that happens across it. It'll force the creature to love you unconditionally until the creature can reject the spirit.
The Ghostblade is a technique forged of desperation -- as many spirits as you have on you will dive into your aura, strengthening your attacks with the power of the Otherworld. The more, the scarier!
The spirits that follow you are getting more brazen -- now one will, if you ask, basically detonate itself in a violent scream of otherworldy energies. Don't stand too near when it does so.

skill.name: Inquisitor
skill.description: The hammer of righteousness is strong in your arms!

description.text: The hammer of righteousness is strong in your arms!
The proper term is 'Smite Evil,' not 'Bump Uglies'.
Not necessarily a sword, mind you, just the idea of one will do.
There, but for the grace of god, go you.

It is said that if you know your enemies and know yourself, you will not be imperiled in a hundred battles; if you do not know your enemies but do know yourself, you will win one and lose one; if you do not know your enemies nor yourself, you will be imperiled in every single battle.
Your patron shields you from harm for your mighty faith.
By the power of Krong, you are HEALED!

skill.name: Spellsword
skill.description: You mix magic and melee in a unique and devastating way.

description.text: You mix magic and melee in a unique and devastating way.

The most basic thing a spellsword learns is how to activate a magical 'mode'. Using such a mode will align the elements that the rest of their spellsword training teaches and shield them from that element.
By reaching into your elemental self, you can draw forth some of that energy and use it to damage an opponent. This is not without cost: your ability to do this is limited by your mana pool.
Your ability to draw out your elemental attunement has improved to the point where it is now reflex. Any enemy that strikes you has a chance to be struck in turn with some of your elemental energies.

As your spellsword skills hone themselves, you find yourself able to intensify your attunement, granting you a larger benefit when attuned. Further, you can retain some of that energy even when in another mode.
You can now throw your elemental energies about. This is an expensive and risky tactic: expending all your energy on vortices will leave you unable to perform arcane strikes.

The ultimate spellsword technique involves careful planning: this ability can be used as a basic--albeit expensive--attack skill, but when you have prime focus in all four of your elemental foci, you can empower this attack to an absurd degree.

skill.name: Trapsmith
skill.description: You have studied ancient texts and learned how to access the Paraelemental Plane of Traps.

description.text: You have studied ancient texts and learned how to access the Paraelemental Plane of Traps.
Footy traps are a basic device that impedes the movement of those unfortunate to step into one. You can call these directly from the Paraelemental Plane of Traps to any place of your choosing.
Midas traps, when triggered, transform small portions of their victim into gold coins. This ability lets you summon organic, free-range midas traps directly into your immediate surroundings.

Deadfall traps (also known as load-bearing traps) drop a pile of rubble onto whoever happens to blunder into their trigger. This power lets you craft bespoke, artisanal deadfall traps wherever you point.

Explosive runes violently explode when read, touched, or sometimes even just when left alone. They're very volatile. This power lets you scribe masterfully written calligraphy that explodes anywhere within your sight.

Vacuum traps suck all the air out of an area and pull anything inside it towards the center. Hapless creatures within its range will find it difficult to breathe. This power lets you source vintage vacuum traps directly from the Paraelemental Plane of Traps.

Blink traps send their victims careening around in random directions through magical displacement. Since these traps are very inefficient, they use some of the victim's body to power the trap, transmuting portions of their body into arcane energy. This power places hand-crafted, antique blink traps gently onto the floor nearby.

Thunderbolt traps are a shocking flash and a bang (not to be confused with a flashbang). This skill summons forth a rustic, farm-to-table thunderbolt trap from the Quasiparaelemental Demiplane of Electrical Traps.

Found on the edges of the Quasiparaelemental Demiplane of Evil Traps, nethercurse traps are a particularly vile trap that is often described with words like 'overkill', 'extreme prejudice', and 'I think I found his finger'. This ability lets you put one nearby. Just...not too nearby. You don't want to get any on you.

skill.name: Brofistery
skill.description: You have studied at the table of Sweet Bro and Hella Jeff, and have come away TOTALLY RIGHTEOUS.

description.text: You have studied at the table of Sweet Bro and Hella Jeff, and have come away TOTALLY RIGHTEOUS.
NOT IN THE FACE
The most basic attack form of brofistery, you strike an opponent with some righteous power. Occasionally, you can make it explode.
Your totally bodacious righteousness makes your enemies weaker and fuels your own power.
Summon a bro to help you kill foes, bro. Bros before foes!
Ra-a Oo-ma-ma Ga-ga Ooh-laa-laa, want your bad bromance.

ability.name: Dr. Zhivabro, or How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love the Brofist

description.text: I love the smell of gnarly brofists in the morning.
Not to be confused with the Courage or the Wisdom of the Broforce.
You are become Bro, destroyer of tools.

skill.name: Dadinavian Wizardry
skill.description: Dadinavian wizards are a cadre of wizards from the North (lots of places have a 'north'). They wear cargo shorts and wraparound sunglasses, and are widely known as Masters of the Grilling Arts.

description.text: Dadinavian wizards are a highly hierarchical cadre of wizards from the North (lots of places have a 'north'). They wear cargo shorts and wraparound sunglasses, and are widely known as Masters of the Grilling Arts.
Dadinavian wizards must be tranquil as the forest.
Dadinavian wizards must have the passionate fire of The Grill in their hearts.
Dadinavian wizards must be as swift as the coursing river.
Dadinavian wizards must have the force of a great typhoon.
Dadinavian wizards must possess the strength of the raging fire.

ability.name: Mysterious as the Dark Side of the Moon
ability.learnrecipe: Cargo Shorts of the White Wizard

description.text: Dadinavian wizards are, above all else, mysterious as the dark side of the moon.

spell.name: Mysterious as the Dark Side of the Moon
